hook: Train a blocky miner through one idle Mining activity, gather ore, upgrade the pickaxe, and unlock deeper mine nodes.

loop.player_intent: Pick the best currently available mining target.
loop.feedback: Selected node highlights and shows yield, interval, XP, and next unlock.
loop.blocked_state: Locked nodes show the missing Mining level or tool requirement.

loop.feedback: Progress bar fills, miner animation strikes the node, reward log updates.
loop.failure_state: No failure in v0.01; mining is a safe idle activity.

loop.player_intent: Notice and optionally claim a short bonus.
loop.feedback: A geode/rich-vein callout appears with a clear timer or claim state.
loop.blocked_state: If the event hides the core progress bar or confuses the main action, remove it.

loop.player_intent: Spend gathered value to improve future mining.
loop.feedback: Before/after interval or yield change is shown.
loop.blocked_state: Unaffordable upgrade shows exact missing resource.

loop.player_intent: Move from starter mining to a better target.
loop.feedback: New node unlock animation and node list update.
loop.blocked_state: Next locked node remains visible with a simple requirement.

first_slice_system_map.reason_to_return: mine faster, unlock deeper nodes, prepare future smithing/combat
